images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model, embodying a top-tier gravure idol aesthetic, captured in a surreal yet sensual study session perched dangerously on a cliff edge. She is wearing a form-fitting, backless evening gown made of liquid silk that clings to her slim waist and ample curves, the intricate fabric texture shimmering in the dim light, paired with a delicate choker. Her legs are crossed in a seductive pose, and she is captured mid-yawn with a cute, drowsy expression, her large expressive eyes half-closed. The scene is bathed in a dark moody green color grade with dreamy soft focus, overlaid with projector patterns that cast geometric shadows on her flawless skin, visible pores, and silky straight black hair. Shot on Sony A7R IV with an 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, utilizing depth of field to blur the hazardous drop-off behind her, enhanced by ray tracing and global illumination for a surreal yet hyper-realistic vibe.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
